suppress.notes: Nu Html Checker (validator.nu) contains a restriction bypass that allows remote attackers to make the server perform arbitrary HTTP/HTTPS requests to internal resources, including localhost services.

By selecting these links, you will be leaving NIST webspace. We have provided these links to other web sites because they may have information that would be of interest to you. No inferences should be drawn on account of other sites being referenced,

jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From 2.8.0 until 2.18.9, 2.21.5, and 3.1.4, version 2.22.0 was published on Jun 02, 2026, but still contains the vulnerability. The issue is fixed in 2.22.1, 2.23.0, and 3.2.0. version "tools.jackson.core:jackson-core:3.2.0" will implay code changes and may not be compatible with the current code base. Therefore, we will suppress this CVE for now.
